text: This chapter shall be known and may be cited as the “Motor Vehicle Theft Prevention Act.”

# Vehicle Code
## Division 4. SPECIAL ANTITHEFT LAWS [10500 - 10904]
### Chapter 5. Motor Vehicle Theft Prevention [10900 - 10904]
##### § 10900

This chapter shall be known and may be cited as the “Motor Vehicle Theft Prevention Act.”

*(Added by Stats. 1994, Ch. 1248, Sec. 5. Effective January 1, 1995.)*

subsections.text: This chapter shall be known and may be cited as the “Motor Vehicle Theft Prevention Act.”
